---
title: "Sarah Martin"
---

## Sarah Martin

**Dates:** (1791-1843)

### Description

prison visitor

### Biography

She was the subject of a biography by CMY in the second series of <i>Biographies of Good Women</i> (1865).

### Letters

- Letter from March 26th 1861
- Letter from Decr 4th 1860

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
